title: Eva unit 04 in rebuild 222
wikitext:
[]: Eva unit 04 in rebuild 2.22 (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Zeruel » Fri Mar 12, 2010 5:00 am I was curious for 2.02 did they actually show eva unit 4 in the movie or basically a prettier version of what happend to it in the show?

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Fri Mar 12, 2010 6:35 am It was... BOOM! And so.

[]: Re: Eva unit 04 in rebuild 2.22 (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Azathoth » Fri Mar 12, 2010 7:35 am Zeruel wrote: I was curious for 2.02 did they actually show eva unit 4 in the movie or basically a prettier version of what happend to it in the show?

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Fri Mar 12, 2010 8:21 am There's no need for it because an incident should remain in a shroud of mystery. At last for the sake of next movies.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Fri Mar 12, 2010 9:13 am Unit 04 exploding was the only thing aside from the battles I didn't skip, so she isn't there. What? I'm waiting for a DVD release before seeing the entire thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Fri Mar 12, 2010 10:07 am You never know what they could add in 2.22 They could just add a still shot of it in restraints before the explosion.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Mar 13, 2010 2:03 am The only feasible way Eva Unit 04 could exist on screen is if someone at NERV was looking at a schematic or photograph of the Unit after the explosion. There's no valid reason to show the Eva. I remember before 2.0 having several discussions with people on here who felt the film would actually switch over to America for a couple minutes to show the explosion happen so we could see the Eva in action. Nah. Eva Unit 04 has no reason to be on screen. ...Doesn't stop them from selling expensive action figures of it though!

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Mar 13, 2010 9:58 am So can we safely say that Unit 04 is like the Boba Fett of Evangelion where she does little for the plot yet people like the monster anyway?

[]:             Quote Post by WellManicuredMan » Sat Mar 13, 2010 11:29 am Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: So can we safely say that Unit 04 is like the Boba Fett of Evangelion where she does little for the plot yet people like the monster anyway?

[]:             Quote Post by jayngfet » Sat Mar 13, 2010 8:54 pm WellManicuredMan wrote: Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: So can we safely say that Unit 04 is like the Boba Fett of Evangelion where she does little for the plot yet people like the monster anyway?

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Mar 13, 2010 9:50 pm It helps that 04 is the coolest looking evangelion in the series. It's chrome and crimson, and theoretically built on the previous EVA's so it should be the most powerful evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Mar 13, 2010 9:57 pm Sorry Eva-04 fans, but Eva-01 is the most powerful. That's just the way Yui rolls. Anyways, wasn't there a cut of the explosion scene from space that got cut from 2.0? Or am I just misremembering? If it was cut, I bet that that's probably all 2.22 will include as far as Eva-04 goes.

[]:             Quote Post by Desu Almark » Sun Mar 14, 2010 1:27 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Eva Unit 04 has no reason to be on screen.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Mar 14, 2010 10:56 am Legendary wrote: Anyways, wasn't there a cut of the explosion scene from space that got cut from 2.0? Or am I just misremembering?
